label: hate
rationale: 'no kisii will be a president in Kenya' declares an entire community categorically unfit to lead.

label: offensive
rationale: 'arseholes especially from his tribe' - vulgar language about politicians, not transferred onto tribe as a whole.

label: neither
rationale: Condemns Gachagua for 'setting Mji-Kenda against Swahilis' - criticizing ethnic incitement, not expressing it.

label: neither
rationale: 'these guys sold theirs' - political criticism of selling out, no ethnic contempt.

label: neither
rationale: Political commentary about IEBC and 'konde boy' - no ethnic targeting or contempt.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Gachagua naye ni takataka' - personal insult (garbage/trash) aimed at one politician.

label: neither
rationale: Condemns 'tribal nonsense from dcp' - criticizing tribalism, not expressing it.

label: neither
rationale: 'Kalonzo will only be voted na hawa Wakamba' - ethnic-bloc voting analysis, no contempt.

label: offensive
rationale: 'corrupt looter and murderer kasongo', 'crash the kasongo goons into pieces' - violent rhetoric about politicians and militia, not ethnic groups.

label: neither
rationale: 'kule kisii ukiwa against matiangi itakua ngumu' - regional political analysis, no contempt.

label: hate
rationale: 'Mbeere and Kirinyaga as a whole, has the most useless men with zero balls' - collective degrading attribution to regional/ethnic community.

label: offensive
rationale: 'All Kenyan MPs ni Wantam shenzi sana' - insults political class, not an ethnic group.

label: hate
rationale: 'murderous cultist', 'blight', 'complete removal' - dehumanization and call for removal of Persian/Iranian people.

label: offensive
rationale: 'kasongo fucked us long time ago' - vulgar political criticism, no clear ethnic target.

label: neither
rationale: Neutral reporting of Gachagua's statement about treating Moses Kuria as outcast.

label: offensive
rationale: 'united opposition baboons ni ovyo' - dehumanizing term applied to politicians/opposition, not ethnic group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Kasongo supporters are naturally stupid' - insults political supporters, not tied to ethnicity.

label: neither
rationale: 'unity of Luos and luhyas is needed for him to win' - ethnic-bloc electoral analysis, no contempt.

label: neither
rationale: 'Luos have been the MOST shocked by DCP's victory' - observation about community reaction, no attack.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Makende ya chimpanzee', 'Kinembe ya mbwa' - vulgar personal insults directed at individual Orengo.

label: neither
rationale: Electoral analysis mentioning Gusii, Kikuyu voting patterns - no contempt, political commentary.

label: neither
rationale: 'I would rather hate this guy than kindiki' - personal political preference.

label: hate
rationale: 'blacks are literally retarded adults' - collective dehumanizing attribution to racial group.

label: neither
rationale: 'Gachagua is more kikuyu than Kindiki' - comparing ethnic credentials of politicians, no contempt.

label: neither
rationale: 'Ol Kalou imejaa wakikuyu, SMH' - demographic observation with mild disapproval, not ethnic contempt.
